name: Meike 85mm f/1.8 AF Lens
description: A sophisticated portrait-length prime, this Meike 85mm f/1.8 Full Frame AF Lens is a short-telephoto lens designed for FUJIFILM X-mount full-frame mirrorless cameras.

features.Key Features:: Full-Frame | f/1.8 to f/22 | Fast Aperture Portrait-Length Prime | Autofocus Design | STM Stepping Motor | Multi-Layer Coatings | Electronic Contacts Maintain Exif Data | Rounded 9-Blade Diaphragm | USB Port for Firmware Upgrades
features.What's in The Box?: Meike 85mm f/1.8 Full Frame AF Lens | Front and Rear Lens Caps | Lens Hood
